description: Likely removes distractor colors or extracts/recolors the relevant structure while preserving the canvas size. Removes input color(s) [1]; output colors are a subset of input colors. Primary structural cue: color subset. Inferred transformation family: delete/extract/recolor. The rule is likely but may need pixel-level refinement.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_363442ee(I):
    x1 = ofcolor(I, ONE)
    x2 = crop(I, ORIGIN, THREE_BY_THREE)
    x3 = asobject(x2)
    x4 = lbind(shift, x3)
    x5 = compose(x4, decrement)
    x6 = mapply(x5, x1)
    O = paint(I, x6)
    return O
